projects.name: Assets & Electronic Devices Register
projects.description: Build a complete, accurate inventory of all hardware and electronic devices across Elecnor Australia. This is a foundational project — without knowing what we have, we can't manage it, secure it, or plan replacements.
goals: Catalogue all laptops, phones, tablets and peripherals
Record serial numbers, owners, locations and warranty status
Establish a process for onboarding new devices going forward
projects.notes: Prerit is trying to find if we can integrate this asset register with our new IT Provider.

projects.name: Futura ERP Service Study
projects.description: Assess the current Futura ERP system — its capabilities, limitations, and fit for Elecnor Australia's needs. Determine whether to upgrade, extend, or replace it, and define a roadmap for improvement.
goals: Understand current Futura usage and pain points
Evaluate upgrade vs replacement options and costs
Recommend a path forward with business case
stages: Stakeholder interviews on current pain points

projects.name: New eANZ Website
projects.description: Redesign and rebuild the Elecnor Australia website to reflect current capabilities, project credentials and brand. Particular focus on showcasing HV, renewables and data centre capability to attract new clients and partners.
goals: Refresh brand and content to reflect 2026 capabilities
Showcase EnergyConnect and major project credentials
Optimise for mobile and SEO

projects.name: eANZ SharePoint & Intranet
projects.description: Design and deploy a SharePoint-based intranet and document management system for Elecnor Australia. The platform will serve as the single source of truth for company documents, policies, and team communications.
goals: Deploy SharePoint intranet with company news and key links
Migrate critical documents from shared drives
Integrate with Microsoft Teams for seamless collaboration

projects.name: T&T Delivery Framework & Governance
projects.description: Design the lightweight methodology that governs how T&T runs and tracks all projects. Defines how decisions are made, how progress is reported to leadership, and how the program evolves each quarter.
goals: Define T&T governance structure and decision rights
Create quarterly review cadence and reporting template
Establish weekly T&T coffee agenda format

projects.name: Travel Management Review
projects.description: Review and digitalise how Elecnor Australia manages business travel — flights, rental cars and hotel bookings. Assess current tools, policies and spend, and implement a streamlined digital solution.
goals: Map current travel booking process and costs
Evaluate travel management platforms
Implement approved tool with policy guardrails

projects.name: Expenses Claims Digitalisation
projects.description: Replace the current manual expense claims process with a digital workflow. Review available apps, select a solution, redesign the approval process and roll it out across eANZ.
goals: Audit current expense claim process and pain points
Evaluate and select a digital expense management tool
Design and deploy new digital workflow with approvals

projects.name: Software Systems Audit
projects.description: Map every software system in use across eANZ — name, function, business area, owner and annual cost. This audit will identify duplication, shadow IT, cost savings and gaps before any new systems are selected.
goals: List all active SaaS, on-premise and licensed software
Capture annual spend and contract renewal dates
Identify overlap, underused tools and security risks

projects.name: AI Adoption Roadmap
projects.description: Identify where AI can create the most value inside Elecnor Australia — from quick wins like document drafting and reporting, to strategic plays like market intelligence and project estimation.
goals: Map current manual processes that could be AI-assisted
Identify 3–5 quick win pilots to launch in 2026
Build a 12-month AI adoption roadmap for leadership approval

projects.name: Market Intelligence Capability
projects.description: Build a structured market intelligence function inside eANZ — tracking competitor activity, sector trends, tender pipelines and strategic opportunities like the data centre boom.
goals: Define the sectors and signals worth tracking
Set up monitoring tools and reporting templates
Deliver first market intelligence report to MD & CFO
